name: Headwaters State Bank
description_short: FDIC-insured community bank in Wisconsin offering checking, savings, mortgages, business banking, and online account management with branches in Land O' Lakes and Presque Isle.
description_long:
Headwaters State Bank is a regional FDIC-insured bank based in Land O' Lakes, Wisconsin, serving northern Wisconsin and Michigan's Upper Peninsula. The bank operates two physical branch locations—a main office in Land O' Lakes and a branch in Presque Isle—plus a network of ATMs through partnerships with Shazam and other networks. Founded to serve the local community, Headwaters positions itself as a trusted, accessible financial institution with personalized service. The bank has recently updated its digital presence and website branding while maintaining its core mission as a traditional community bank.

Headwaters State Bank offers a comprehensive range of consumer and business banking products. On the personal side, they provide checking and savings accounts, student checking accounts, Certificate of Deposit (CD) specials with competitive rates on 7-month and 14-month terms, and mortgage products including home purchase, refinance, and remodeling loans. For business customers, the bank offers business checking accounts and commercial lending services. Online banking is available for account management and bill payment, with mobile accessibility emphasized on their marketing materials. The bank also provides financial calculators to help customers plan budgets and savings goals.

Headwaters differentiates itself as a community-focused institution with local branch service and direct personal assistance. They emphasize expert guidance for mortgage decisions and present themselves as an alternative to larger national banks, highlighting the relationship-based approach typical of regional banks. Their CD specials and student checking products are specifically marketed to different demographic segments. The bank maintains traditional lobby and drive-up hours and prominently displays FDIC insurance protection as a key security feature.

As a small regional bank, Headwaters serves a limited geographic footprint and may have fewer digital features compared to major national banks or online-only institutions. The website provides basic information but limited detail on specific rates, fees, or comprehensive product specifications. Customers outside the Wisconsin-Michigan border region would need to rely entirely on online and phone banking without local branch access. The bank appears well-suited for customers prioritizing local relationships and community banking over extensive product variety or cutting-edge digital platforms. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Certificate of Deposit (CD) products with special rates
Debit cards with fraud protection and lost card reporting
pros: FDIC-insured deposits, backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Competitive CD rates on 7-month and 14-month deposit specials
Student checking accounts designed with flexibility for educational focus
Expert mortgage guidance for home purchase, refinance, and remodeling needs
Online banking with mobile accessibility for account management on-the-go
Two physical branches with extended hours including Saturday drive-up service
Business checking accounts and commercial lending for small business owners
cons: Limited geographic footprint—only two physical branches in rural Wisconsin/Michigan border area
Website lacks specific interest rates, fee schedules, and detailed product specifications
No mention of advanced digital features like mobile deposit, P2P payments, or wealth management tools
Out-of-network ATM fees likely apply for customers traveling outside service area
Small bank may have limited loan products compared to regional or national competitors

contact.address: 4175 County Road B, Land O' Lakes, WI 54540

best_for: Residents of northern Wisconsin (Land O' Lakes and Presque Isle area) seeking community banking relationships
Small business owners in rural Wisconsin-Michigan border region needing local commercial banking
Customers prioritizing in-person branch service and direct personal assistance for mortgage decisions
Conservative savers interested in CD products with competitive rates at an FDIC-insured institution
diagnosis: Headwaters State Bank is best for customers in rural Wisconsin and Michigan's Upper Peninsula seeking traditional community banking with personal service and FDIC insurance protection. The main caveat is their extremely limited geographic reach—without a nearby branch, customers will be largely confined to basic online and phone banking, making them unsuitable for those who value in-person service or those relocating outside their service area.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 4175 County Road B, Land O' Lakes, WI 54540
